entries.title: Public Actions admin index.
entries.notes: Capture the configured actions list with at least one active action.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews configured public actions and their enabled/site state.

entries.title: Public Action create/edit form.
entries.notes: Show handler, site scope, redirect/messages, API/Zapier toggles, and payload schema fields.
entries.useCase: An administrator configures handler, site scope, redirect/messages, API/Zapier toggles, and payload schema fields.

entries.title: Public Action destinations.
entries.notes: Capture the destination list or form with secrets redacted.
entries.useCase: An administrator configures outbound destinations while secrets stay redacted.

entries.title: Public Action submissions.
entries.notes: Capture received submissions and status after demo data is prepared.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews received submissions and processing status.

entries.title: Public Action dispatch attempts.
entries.notes: Capture outbound dispatch status, adapter, response status, and dispatch time.
entries.useCase: An operator reviews outbound dispatch status, adapter, response status, and dispatch timing.

entries.title: Public Action integration tokens.
entries.notes: Capture the token list and create-token modal without exposing token values.
entries.useCase: An administrator creates or reviews integration tokens without exposing token values.

entries.title: Public Action frontend form.
entries.notes: Capture the public form for an active action with no admin-only metadata visible.
entries.useCase: A visitor submits an active public action form with no admin-only metadata visible.

entries.title: Zapier action discovery API.
entries.notes: Capture or assert the authenticated API response shape using a demo token.
entries.useCase: An integration client verifies the authenticated Zapier action discovery response shape with a demo token.
